description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the sdesbure/yamllint:latest Docker image. Add a lint-ci-gitlab job (default stage) that runs only when any *.yml file changes and executes the command `yamllint .gitlab-ci.yml .gitlab/ci lib/gitlab/ci/templates changelogs`. The job inherits default tags, retry, and only settings via .default-tags, .default-retry, and .default-only. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
